system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan_getbysp2","body":"CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_DINHMUC_GOVAN_GETBYSP2]
(
	@masp nvarchar(200)
)
AS
BEGIN
	SELECT A.id, A.masp, 
		A.mact, A.stt,
		dbo.GetNameBySTT(a.masp, LEFT(A.stt,1)) AS cumchitiet,
		A.chitiet, A.nguyenlieu, 
		A.dayy_tc, A.rong_tc, A.dai_tc, A.soluong_tc, A.m3_tc,
		A.dayy_sc, A.rong_sc, A.dai_sc, A.soluong_sc, 
		m3_sc = (A.dayy_sc * A.rong_sc * A.dai_sc * A.soluong_sc)/1000000000,
	
		non_fsc = IIF(A.fsc_id = 1, CONVERT(bit, 1), CONVERT(bit, 0)), 
		fsc_100 = IIF(A.fsc_id = 2, CONVERT(bit, 1), CONVERT(bit, 0)), 
		fsc_cw = IIF(A.fsc_id = 3, CONVERT(bit, 1), CONVERT(bit, 0)), 
		fsc_mix = IIF(A.fsc_id = 3, CONVERT(bit, 1), CONVERT(bit, 0)), 
		fsc_recycled = IIF(A.fsc_id = 4, CONVERT(bit, 1), CONVERT(bit, 0)),
		A.fsc_id,
		A.mong1, A.mong2,
		C.loaihang AS tenveneer_matchinh,
		D.loaihang AS tenveneer_matphu,
		VNC.loaihang AS tenveneer_dancanh,
		A.veneer_canhdai, a.veneer_canhngan,
		UVMC.loai_uv AS tenuv_matchinh1,
		UVMP.loai_uv AS tenuv_matphu1,
		UVCN.loai_uv AS tenuv_canhngan1,
		UVCD.loai_uv AS tenuv_canhdai1,
		B.ma_btp, B.ma_erp, B.masp AS masp1,
		A.ghichu,
		ghichu1 = A.ghichu
	FROM tr_dinhmuc_govan A
		INNER JOIN tr_sanpham B ON A.masp = B.masp
		LEFT JOIN tr_baogia_chiphi_veneer C ON A.veneer_matchinh = C.id
		LEFT JOIN tr_baogia_chiphi_veneer D ON A.veneer_matphu = D.id
		LEFT JOIN tr_baogia_chiphi_veneer VNC ON A.veneer_dan_canh = VNC.id
		LEFT JOIN tr_loai_uv UVMC ON A.uv_matchinh1 = UVMC.id
		LEFT JOIN tr_loai_uv UVMP ON A.uv_matphu1 = UVMP.id
		LEFT JOIN tr_loai_uv UVCN ON A.uv_canhngan1 = UVCN.id
		LEFT JOIN tr_loai_uv UVCD ON A.uv_canhdai1 = UVCD.id
	WHERE a.masp = @masp AND ISNULL(a.mact, '') <> '000'
	ORDER BY LEFT(A.stt, 1), REPLACE(A.stt, LEFT(A.stt, 1), '')
END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_baogia_chiphi_veneer","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_loai_uv","dbo.tr_sanpham"],"writesTables":[],"flags":[],"suggestedTier":"B"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
